title: Galli 2015 wheelchair full-body PPS
citation: Galli, G., Noel, J. P., Canzoneri, E., Blanke, O., & Serino, A. (2015). The wheelchair as a full-body tool extending the peripersonal space. Frontiers in Psychology, 6, 639.
notes: Wheelchair-training PPS task. The profile captures trunk tactile timing and front/back looming structure; active/passive training condition is not yet a GUI factor.

provenance.source: Frontiers methods report tactile delays at 380, 760, 1140, 1520, 1900, and 2280 ms from sound onset.
Methods report 144 audio-tactile trials, 24 auditory catch trials, and 48 tactile baseline trials.
